data.title: Startup Multiply Labs reduces cell therapy costs by 70% with NVIDIA-powered robots, targeting a $38B market. Robots minimize contamination risk.
data.description: A startup based in San Francisco is leveraging NVIDIA Isaac Sim and Omniverse technologies to automate the manufacturing process for cell therapy. This innovative approach is designed to tap into a $38 billion market by utilizing robotics to reduce the risk of contamination.

data.title: Public health groups seek injunctive relief against immunization schedule changes at an upcoming ACIP meeting. Court hearing on February 13.
data.description: The upcoming AAP v. Kennedy case involves plaintiffs aiming to halt the upcoming February 25-26 ACIP meeting. They seek to prevent the meeting from occurring and will request the Court to nullify the modifications made to the pediatric immunization schedule on January 5. The plaintiffs advocate for reverting the childhood schedule back to its state as of April 15, 2025.

data.title: Warren urges SEC to address crypto risks amid Trump's plan to include crypto in retirement accounts, potentially risking savings.
data.description: Warren has expressed concern that the actions taken by the Trump administration could potentially subject retirement savers to increased fees, significant losses, and diminished regulatory scrutiny.

data.title: Conflux (CFX) updates to v3.0.2 node, enhancing RPC performance and fixing critical bugs. Optional upgrade for stability.
data.description: The Conflux (CFX) Network has introduced a new v3.0.2 node upgrade to address critical RPC bugs and include additional developer endpoints. This optional upgrade aims to enhance stability and performance.

data.title: Kontrol Technologies reveals AGM voting results on Dec 30, 2025. Details available on SEDAR+. 1. ELECTION OF DIRECTORS.
data.description: In a recent press release, Kontrol Technologies Corp. shared the outcomes of the voting process at its annual general meeting of shareholders conducted on December 30, 2025. Further information regarding the proceedings can be accessed in the Company’s management information circular from November 26, 2025. The event encompassed crucial decisions including the election of directors, as detailed on their profile on SEDAR at www.sedarplus.ca. The company is listed as Cboe CA:KNR, OTCQB:KNRLF, and FSE:1K8.

data.title: Terrafina's tender offer for 4.962% Senior Notes Due 2029 expired on 01/12/26 at 5:00 p.m., New York City time.
data.description: In Mexico City on Jan. 12, 2026, Banco Actinver, S.A., Institución de Banca Múltiple, Grupo Financiero Actinver, División Fiduciaria, acting as trustee under the Irrevocable Trust Agreement No. 6274, also known as Terrafina (BMV: TERRA13), a prominent Mexican industrial real estate investment trust focused on acquiring, developing, leasing, and managing industrial properties in Mexico, has reported that its cash tender offer for all its outstanding 4.962% Notes due 2029 has concluded. The Tender Offer expired at 5:00 p.m., New York City time, on Jan. 12, 2026, the Expiration Date.

data.title: Walker & Dunlop expands Capital Markets in Miami with Michael Stepniewski joining from Manhattan, offering expertise in South Florida.
data.description: Walker & Dunlop, Inc. has revealed its plans to strengthen its Capital Markets Institutional Advisory operations in South Florida by welcoming Michael Stepniewski to the team. Stepniewski, who is moving from Manhattan to Miami, will provide expert advice on financing strategies for various asset types in the region. This move aims to capitalize on Stepniewski's local South Florida knowledge while utilizing Walker & Dunlop's nationwide resources. The decision to expand in Miami aligns with the city's flourishing status as a top institutional market.

data.title: Trump's economic message connects with voters, delivers key numbers.
data.description: An announcement was made recently that there have been a total of 500 confirmed cases of a new virus in a city, with 20 reported fatalities. The government has taken action by implementing quarantines and travel restrictions in an effort to control the spread of the virus. Health officials are urging the public to practice good hygiene and seek medical attention if they exhibit any symptoms of the illness. The situation is being closely monitored for any further developments.

data.title: K1 Investment Management exits TechnoMile, a government contractor platform with 4x growth.
data.description: TechnoMile, a company founded by an AI-powered entrepreneur, has experienced tremendous growth, with an increase of over 4 times in their success. This news comes from Manhattan Beach, California, on January 12, 2026, through a press release. K1 Investment Management, LLC, a major investor in AI-driven small-cap enterprise software, revealed that TechnoMile, one of its portfolio companies, achieved this remarkable growth.

data.title: GitHub Copilot enhances AI coding with custom instructions, reusable prompts, and specialized agents for better output.
data.description: GitHub released a report outlining three effective strategies for developers to enhance AI coding results. These methods include utilizing custom instructions, creating reusable prompts, and employing specialized agents. These techniques aim to improve the efficiency and accuracy of AI programming.
